Professional Pool Services

Comprehensive pool care solutions to keep your pool crystal clear, safe, and ready for enjoyment year-round

Get Your Free Quote

Complete Pool Care Solutions

From routine maintenance to emergency repairs, we provide everything you need to keep your pool in perfect condition

Weekly Pool Cleaning

Comprehensive weekly service including skimming, vacuuming, brushing walls and steps, emptying baskets, and water testing. Keep your pool pristine with our reliable weekly visits.

Starting at $120/month

Chemical Balancing

Professional water testing and chemical adjustment to maintain proper pH, chlorine, alkalinity, and sanitizer levels. Ensure safe, comfortable swimming conditions year-round.

Included with service plans

Equipment Maintenance

Regular inspection and maintenance of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. Prevent costly repairs with proactive equipment care and professional diagnostics.

$85/hour + parts

One-Time Deep Clean

Intensive cleaning service for pools that need extra attention. Includes algae treatment, heavy debris removal, thorough scrubbing, and complete water balancing.

$185 - $285

Seasonal Opening & Closing

Professional pool opening in spring and winterization in fall. Equipment startup/shutdown, water balancing, and seasonal chemical treatment to protect your investment.

$195 - $325 per service

Emergency Service

Rapid response for pool emergencies including green water, equipment failures, and urgent repairs. Available 7 days a week for critical pool issues.

$125 service call + hourly rate

How We Keep Your Pool Perfect

Our proven 4-step process ensures consistent, professional pool care every single visit

1

Arrive & Assess

We arrive on schedule, conduct a visual inspection of your pool, equipment, and water clarity to determine the day's priorities.

2

Clean & Service

Skim surface debris, vacuum pool floor, brush walls and steps, empty skimmer and pump baskets, and clean waterline.

3

Test & Balance

Test water chemistry, adjust pH and chlorine levels, add necessary chemicals, and check equipment operation.

4

Report & Go

Document service completed, note any issues or recommendations, and leave your pool ready for immediate enjoyment.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to common questions about our pool services

How often should my pool be cleaned?

For most residential pools, weekly service is optimal. This maintains water quality, prevents algae growth, and keeps equipment running efficiently. High-use pools or those with heavy tree coverage may benefit from twice-weekly service.

Do I need to be home during service?

No, you don't need to be home. Most of our clients prefer the convenience of service while they're at work. We'll access your pool area safely and securely, complete the service, and leave everything ready for your enjoyment.

What chemicals do you use?

We use only professional-grade chemicals from trusted manufacturers. All chemicals are included in our service plans. We'll balance pH, chlorine, alkalinity, and add algaecides or shock treatment as needed to maintain crystal clear, safe water.

What happens if my pool turns green?

Green water indicates algae growth, which we can typically clear in 24-48 hours. We'll perform shock treatment, intensive cleaning, and may recommend running your filter continuously until the water clears. This service is included for weekly service customers.

Do you provide equipment repair services?

Yes, we diagnose and repair pool equipment including pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. We carry common replacement parts and can order specialized equipment. Our technicians are experienced with all major pool equipment brands.

Can you service my pool if I'm not a weekly customer?

Absolutely! We offer one-time cleaning, equipment repairs, chemical balancing, and emergency services for all pool owners. While weekly customers receive priority scheduling, we're happy to help with any pool care need.

Ready for Crystal Clear Water?
